bio: Detail-oriented pharmacist dedicated to ensuring safe and effective medication use. Passionate about patient education, healthcare collaboration, and improving outcomes through precision and care.
name: LIAM NGUYEN
title: Clinical Pharmacist

projects.title: Medication Error Reduction Program
projects.description: Implemented protocols that reduced prescription errors and improved patient safety.

projects.title: Community Medication Awareness Campaign
projects.description: Led outreach programs to educate patients on safe medication practices.

projects.title: Pharmacy Workflow Optimization
projects.description: Streamlined pharmacy operations to reduce wait times and improve efficiency.

community.description: Provided medication guidance and health screenings in community clinics.
Mentored pharmacy students during clinical placements.

education.description: Advanced training in pharmacotherapy, clinical practice, and patient care.
Focused on chemical processes in living organisms and drug interactions.

highlights: Reviewed prescriptions for accuracy and safety.
Collaborated with healthcare teams to optimize patient treatment plans.
Provided direct counseling to patients on medication use.
experience.description: Ensuring safe and effective medication use in a clinical setting.

highlights: Assisted in dispensing medications and maintaining records.
Interacted with patients to provide basic medication guidance.
experience.description: Gained hands-on experience in retail pharmacy operations.
Supported pharmacy operations and customer service.

sloganHeroSection: Ensuring safer healthcare through knowledge, precision, and care.
